form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.59) when fourth over 390m at Ascot Park in a Class 2. Has a win and three places from four starts from this draw. Has ability and should be around the money.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.56) in a Class 3, finishing a 12 length seventh. Goes very well off the draw boasting three wins and three places from six starts. Looks a key chance.
